body_txt: This is the first person you've ever acknowledged as a friend, maybe even a best friend. They come in three variants: May overlap with Best Friend , if the first person is really that close with you. It could also overlap with with Only Friend if said person was the only friend they had prior to making more companions. It could also lead to a Childhood Friend Romance if the two friends were to fall in love with one another. Truth in Television , as logically for anyone who has ever had friends someone must have been the first. While they do exist however, they are far too common and also far too personal to talk about, so No Real Life Examples, Please!
